title: 7 Revoking a Scrubbed Email Address
body_text:
7	Revoking a Scrubbed Email Address
7.1	Overview of Revoking a Scrubbed Email Address
A scrubbed email address is an email address that has been placed on a special list of email addresses maintained by
Interac
Â®
, because the address has had
Interac
email notifications bounced back to
Interacâs
email servers, for specific reasons, as undeliverable. This special list of email addresses is called the scrubbed email list.
When an email address is on the scrubbed email list,
Interac
doesnât send email notifications to that address, which may block users from completing
Interac
e-Transfer
Â®
transactions.
When an
Interac
email notification is bounced back to
Interacâs
email servers as undeliverable, a reason for returning the email is provided.
Interac
evaluates these reasons, and places the target email address on the scrubbed email list, if the return reason was one of the following:
Bad destination mailbox address
Unable to route
Address doesn't exist
Bad destination system address
Because the conditions causing
Interac
email notifications to be returned may be temporary and arenât considered fraudulent behaviour, only OAS CSRs can delete an email address from the scrubbed email list using Revoke, allowing
Interac
to resume sending email notifications to that email address.
7.2	The Revoke Action
When an OAS CSR knows that the conditions that caused
Interac
to place an email address on the scrubbed email list have been corrected, or are being corrected, they can use the Revoke action to remove the email address from the list.
Scrubbed email addresses are identified in OAS on Customer Details screens or on Transfer Details screens in the form of a red coloured Revoke action appearing on the screen, near the email address, along with a label reading âScrubbed Emailâ. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Revoke
7.3	Revoking a Scrubbed Email Address
To revoke a scrubbed email address:
Open the screen on which the scrubbed email address that you wish to revoke appears (a Transfer Details screen or a Customer Details screen). See Section 4.3, Tracing
Interac
e-Transfer Transactions in OAS, for details on opening a Transfer Details screen or a Customer Details screen.
Select
Revoke
beside the âScrubbed Emailâ label. See Figure 1, above. A Confirm Delete Scrubbed Email Address pop-up screen appears.
Select
Delete
to confirm removing the email address from the scrubbed email list. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Confirm Revoke
Observe that the screen refreshes and the Revoke action and its associated âScrubbed Emailâ label have been removed from view. See Figure 3.
An inline message reading â[scrubbed email address] has been deletedâ appears as further confirmation that the email address is no longer on the scrubbed email list.
Figure 3: Updated Transfer Details screen
The
email address is once again eligible to receive
Interac
e-Transfer transaction notifications.
END
